prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约25226→23098→42149→29369→29930名。2023年出现异常大幅后移（42149名），2024年迅速回稳至29369名，2025年 基本持平于29930名，近两年位次稳定在29000–30000区间，但2026年因大幅扩招预计位次将显著后移；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年82人→202 2年79人→2023年75人→2024年45人→2025年39人，呈持续缩减趋势；但2026年计划大幅扩至64人，较2025年增加25人（+64%），扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低位次（位次数 字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第48名，近年稳定在44–53名区间，在师范类院校中仅次于北京师范大学和华 东师范大学，综合实力强劲；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要因该校硕士报考热度高（拟招3100人，报考预估超1.5万，报录比约5:1），反映社会认可度较高；抖音热度排名第67位（一般），无投档断档记录，整体舆情平稳偏正面；拥有世界史A+、教育学A+、马克思主义理论A+、统计学A、生态学A-、生物学A-等6个A- 及以上学科，学科实力在211高校中名列前茅，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度呈分化观望（2024年），但部属师范院 校仍具稳定吸引力；计算机类、电子信息类等理科招生专业热度较高（推荐/高热推荐）；河南省2026年考生总数约120万人（较2025年90.7万大幅增加约32%），竞争显著加剧， 对位次有前移压力；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区，河南考生对东北高校存在一定地域偏好差异，但作为部属师范院校，跨省吸引力较强；该校 在河南招生规模较大，2026年物理类计划64人，属该校在各省中招生较多的省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次29930名、2026年大幅扩招（+64%）导致位次显著后 移、河南省考生总数大增（+32%）部分对冲扩招效应、声誉偏正面及学科实力强劲等因素，考虑竞争加剧微调后预测最低位次约41363名，区间 40863–41863名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 25226 → 23098 → 42149 → 29369 → 29930. In 2023, there was an abnormal significant backward shift (42149), which quickly stabilized to 29369 in 2024, and remained roughly stable at 29930 in 2025, with rankings in the 29000–30000 range in recent two years. However, due to a substantial enrollment expansion in 2026, rankings are expected to shift significantly backward. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan Province: 2021: 82 → 2022: 79 → 2023: 75 → 2024: 45 → 2025: 39, showing a continuous reduction trend. But in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 64, an increase of 25 (+64%) compared to 2025, a notable expansion that will directly lower rankings (ranking numbers increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 48th, stable in the 44–53 range in recent years. Among normal universities, it is second only to Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University, with strong comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to the high popularity of the university's master's programs (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applicants over 15000, application-to-admission ratio about 5:1), reflecting high social recognition. Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (average), with no record of admission gaps, overall public opinion stable and slightly positive. It has A+ disciplines in World History, Education, and Marxist Theory, A in Statistics, A- in Ecology, and A- in Biology, totaling 6 A- and above disciplines. Its disciplinary strength ranks among the top of 211 universities, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors shows divergence and wait-and-see (2024), but ministry-affiliated normal universities still have stable appeal. Science majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information are highly popular (recommended/highly recommended). In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (a significant increase of about 32% from 907,000 in 2025), intensifying competition and putting upward pressure on rankings. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region. Henan candidates have certain regional preference differences for Northeast universities, but as a ministry-affiliated normal university, it has strong cross-provincial appeal. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan, with 64 physics category slots in 2026, making it one of the provinces with higher enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 29930, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+64%) leading to a notable backward shift in rankings, the large increase in Henan candidates (+32%) partially offsetting the expansion effect, the slightly positive reputation and strong disciplinary strength, and after adjusting for intensified competition, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 41363, with a range of 40863–41863.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Northeast Normal University significantly expands enrollment in the Physics Category in Henan. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 41363, with a range of 40863–41863. Candidates with rankings within 40000 can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics Experimental Class, Biology Experimental Class, Computer Category). Candidates with rankings between 41000–42000 should focus on Tier 2 majors (Physics Category, Chemistry, Digital Media Technology, Statistics). Candidates with rankings above 42000 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Environmental Category, Geography Category, Data Science). Normal majors offer stable employment, and combined with the advantageous disciplines such as Education and Marxist Theory (A+), the overall cost-performance ratio is relatively high.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 3948 → 3294 → 4164 → 3514 → 4542. Overall, there was significant fluctuation, with the highest ranking in 2022 (3294), dropping to 4164 in 2023, recovering to 3514 in 2024, and notably shifting back to 4542 in 2025, showing a backward trend in recent years. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) at this university in Henan: 36 in 2021 → 37 in 2022 → 37 in 2023 → 19 in 2024 → 25 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 42, an increase of 17 (+68%) compared to 2025, which will notably lower the ranking (increase the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top in normal universities, with strong comprehensive strength and high social recognition. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with high popularity for master's applications (application-to-admission ratio about 5:1), reflecting continuously improving social recognition. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (average), with no records of admission interruptions, and overall public opinion is stable. It has top-tier disciplines such as World History A+, Education A+, and Marxist Theory A+, which highly match liberal arts enrollment majors (History, Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory, Education, etc.), exerting strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for normal/education majors is divided and cautious, but traditional normal majors like Chinese Language and Literature and History at ministry-affiliated normal universities still have stable appeal. Law majors are recommended in terms of popularity; Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from 2025), intensifying competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, and Henan candidates have certain regional preference differences for universities in Northeast China, but as a ministry-affiliated 211 normal university, its brand effect is strong, and cross-provincial appeal is sufficient to offset regional concerns.\nCombining the 2025 baseline ranking of 4542, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+68%) leading to a notable backward shift in ranking, the large increase in Henan candidates partially offsetting the expansion effect, the relatively positive reputation, and the strong appeal of A+ disciplines (World History, Education, Marxist Theory) to liberal arts candidates, and considering intensified competition, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6345, with a range of 5845–6845.
